rationale: In the citing paper, Lambrecht and Tucker (2013) appears only once in a grouped footnote citation alongside Danaher et al. (2008) as an example of possible ad-interference effects when banners are placed close together. The paper does not discuss this cited study's findings in detail, and it does not build hypotheses, mechanisms, identification strategy, or empirical design directly from it. Its role is background context for an alternative mechanism that the author notes and then sets aside.
